flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bloomfield College fell 40% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 781).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 38% at Bloomfield College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (901 vs 1.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bloomfield College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (66.8% → 59.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bloomfield College rose 108% between 2006 and 2009 (5.5% → 11.4%).
